definition: Border Gateway Protocol (Port 179) - External path-vector routing protocol.
Open Shortest Path First - Link-state interior gateway protocol.
Mean Time Between Failures - Average operating time between failures for repairable systems.
Mean Time To Failure - Expected operating lifetime before failure for non-repairable components.
Recovery Point Objective - Maximum acceptable data loss measured in time.
Recovery Time Objective - Duration of time within which a business process must be restored.
Perfect Forward Secrecy - Ensures past sessions stay encrypted even if a server key is later compromised.
NTP server that obtains UTC time from a direct physical link to an accurate clock source.
Precision Time Protocol (IEEE 1588) - Used for nanosecond-level time precision.
Network Attached Storage - Appliance dedicated to performing a file server role.
